    Index

    A B C D E F G H I M N O P R S T V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    A

    addToStructure(Block) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
    Crudely request the addition of a validated block to the blockchain.
    ADVANTAGE - Enum constant in enum class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior.ReleaseStrategy
    Release based on the advantage of your chain.
    AttackerSuccessProbabilityAnalyzer - Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils
    Analyzes and calculates attacker success probability based on the Bitcoin whitepaper model.
    AttackerSuccessProbabilityAnalyzer() - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackerSuccessProbabilityAnalyzer
     
    attackId - Variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector.AttackOutcome
     
    ATTACKING - Enum constant in enum class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior.State
    Actively mining a hidden chain while maintaining a public honest appearance.
    attackLog - Static variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Log of attack-related events
    AttackMetricsCollector - Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils
    Collects metrics during simulation to compare actual attack outcomes with theoretical predictions from the Bitcoin whitepaper.
    AttackMetricsCollector.AttackOutcome - Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils
    Represents the outcome of a single attack attempt.
    AttackOutcome(int, long, int) - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector.AttackOutcome
     

    B

    behaviorStrategy - Variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
     
    belief(long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
     
    belief(Transaction) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
     
    beliefReport(long[], long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
    BitcoinDifficultyUtility - Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils
     
    BitcoinDifficultyUtility() - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.BitcoinDifficultyUtility
     
    BitcoinMainDriver - Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin
     
    BitcoinMainDriver() - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.BitcoinMainDriver
     
    BitcoinNode - Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node
    Represents a node in the simulated Bitcoin network.
    BitcoinNode() - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
    DO NOT USE.
    BitcoinNode(Simulation) - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
    Constructs a new BitcoinNode without setting behavior strategy.
    BitcoinNode(Simulation, NodeBehaviorStrategy) - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
    Constructs a new BitcoinNode with a specified behavior strategy.
    BitcoinNodeFactory - Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node
    A factory for various kinds of blockchain nodes.
    BitcoinNodeFactory(String, Simulation) - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNodeFactory
    Create a new factory of a specific type (e.g., Honest, Malicious, etc.) based on the sampler embedded in the Simulator object.
    BitcoinNodeFactory(String, Simulation, PoWNodeSet) - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNodeFactory
     
    BitcoinReporter - Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter
    Specialized reporter for Bitcoin simulations extending the base Reporter.
    BitcoinReporter() - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
     
    BitcoinSimulatorFactory - Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin
    A concrete SimulatorFactory for Bitcoin network simulations.
    BitcoinSimulatorFactory() - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.BitcoinSimulatorFactory
     
    Block - Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure
    Represents a block in a blockchain.
    Block() - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
    Constructs a new Block object with the next available ID.
    Block(List<Transaction>) - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
    Constructs a new Block with a unique ID and an initial list of Transactions.
    blockchain - Variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
     
    Blockchain - Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure
    Represents the blockchain structure for a Bitcoin simulation.
    Blockchain() - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
     
    BlockHeightComparator - Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure
    Comparator for Block objects that orders them based on their block height, with ties broken by block ID.
    BlockHeightComparator() - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.BlockHeightComparator
     
    blockLog - Static variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Log of individual block events for the simulation
    blockWriter - Static variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Writer used for flushing block logs to file
    BTCDifficultyToPackedTarget(BigDecimal) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.BitcoinDifficultyUtility
    From the given bitcoin difficulty, generates the packed target string that is closest to the specified difficulty.
    BTCDifficultyToPoolTarget(BigDecimal) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.BitcoinDifficultyUtility
    From the bitcoin difficulty, generates the equivalent full target string (i.e. pool target).
    BTCToCNS(double) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.BitcoinDifficultyUtility
    Converts from Bitcoin difficulty to CNS difficulty.

    C

    calculateAttackerSuccessProbability(double, int) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackerSuccessProbabilityAnalyzer
    Calculates the probability that an attacker can catch up and overtake the honest chain.
    calculateRequiredConfirmations(double, double) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackerSuccessProbabilityAnalyzer
    Calculates the minimum number of confirmations needed to achieve a target security level.
    cancelAttack() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Cancels an ongoing attack without releasing the hidden chain.
    clone() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
    Returns a shallow copy of this block.
    close(INode) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
     
    CNS_INITIAL_DIFFICULTY - Static variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.BitcoinDifficultyUtility
     
    CNSToBTC(double) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.BitcoinDifficultyUtility
    Converts from CNS difficulty to Bitcoin difficulty.
    CNSToPackedTarget(double) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.BitcoinDifficultyUtility
    Convenience function to directly convert a CNS difficulty to the equivalent packed bitcoin target value (bdiff).
    CNSToPoolTarget(double) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.BitcoinDifficultyUtility
    Convenience function to directly convert a CNS difficulty to the equivalent full bitcoin target value (i.e. pool target value).
    compare(Block, Block) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.BlockHeightComparator
    Compares two Block objects.
    compareWithSimulation(double, int, double, int) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackerSuccessProbabilityAnalyzer
    Compares theoretical probabilities with simulation results.
    completeAttack(long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Releases the accumulated hidden chain to the network.
    completeValidation(TransactionGroup, long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
    Called by the behavior strategy when validation is complete.
    CONFIRMATIONS - Enum constant in enum class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior.ReleaseStrategy
    Release based on the number of confirmations of the target transaction.
    confirmationsAtStart - Variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector.AttackOutcome
     
    conflictFree(Transaction) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.DefaultNodeBehavior
    Returns whether the transaction is free of conflicts with the node's current pool, mining pool, and blockchain structure.
    considerMining(long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.DefaultNodeBehavior
    Evaluates whether the node should be mining and manages transitions between mining and idle states.
    contains(long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
    Checks if a Transaction is contained (anywhere) in the blockchain.
    contains(Block) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
    Checks if a Block is contained in the chain that begins from the parent of the block and reaches the genesis.
    contains(Transaction) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
    Checks if a Transaction is contained (anywhere) in the blockchain.
    createNewNode() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNodeFactory
    Create a new node based on the factory.
    createNodeSet(Simulation) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.BitcoinSimulatorFactory
    Creates a PoWNodeSet for a Bitcoin simulation.
    createSimulation(int) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.BitcoinSimulatorFactory
    Creates and fully configures a new Simulation instance for Bitcoin.

    D

    DefaultNodeBehavior - Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node
    An abstract base class providing default behaviors for Bitcoin network nodes within the Simulation environment.
    DefaultNodeBehavior() - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.DefaultNodeBehavior
     
    dependenciesPresent(Transaction) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.DefaultNodeBehavior
    Returns whether all dependencies of the transaction are satisfied.

    E

    endReason - Variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector.AttackOutcome

    equals(Object) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
     
    event_NodeCompletesValidation(ITxContainer, long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
    event_NodeCompletesValidation(ITxContainer, long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.DefaultNodeBehavior
    Invoked when the node completes validation of a transaction container, such as a newly mined or propagated block.
    event_NodeCompletesValidation(ITxContainer, long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Handles completion of block validation by this node.
    event_NodeCompletesValidation(ITxContainer, long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HonestNodeBehavior
    Handles completion of block validation by this node.
    event_NodeCompletesValidation(ITxContainer, long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.MaliciousNodeBehavior_Deprecated
     
    event_NodeCompletesValidation(ITxContainer, long) - Method in interface dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.NodeBehaviorStrategy
    Invoked when the node completes validation of a transaction container, such as a newly mined or propagated block.
    event_NodeReceivesClientTransaction(Transaction, long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
    event_NodeReceivesClientTransaction(Transaction, long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.DefaultNodeBehavior
    Invoked when the node receives a transaction directly from a client.
    event_NodeReceivesClientTransaction(Transaction, long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Handles transactions received directly from clients.
    event_NodeReceivesClientTransaction(Transaction, long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HonestNodeBehavior
    Handles transactions received directly from clients.
    event_NodeReceivesClientTransaction(Transaction, long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.MaliciousNodeBehavior_Deprecated
     
    event_NodeReceivesClientTransaction(Transaction, long) - Method in interface dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.NodeBehaviorStrategy
    Invoked when the node receives a transaction directly from a client.
    event_NodeReceivesPropagatedContainer(ITxContainer) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
    event_NodeReceivesPropagatedContainer(ITxContainer) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.DefaultNodeBehavior
    Invoked when the node receives a propagated container of transactions, such as a block or batch of transactions.
    event_NodeReceivesPropagatedContainer(ITxContainer) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Handles reception of a propagated block from the network.
    event_NodeReceivesPropagatedContainer(ITxContainer) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HonestNodeBehavior
    Handles reception of a propagated block from another node.
    event_NodeReceivesPropagatedContainer(ITxContainer) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.MaliciousNodeBehavior_Deprecated
     
    event_NodeReceivesPropagatedContainer(ITxContainer) - Method in interface dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.NodeBehaviorStrategy
    Invoked when the node receives a propagated container of transactions, such as a block or batch of transactions.
    event_NodeReceivesPropagatedTransaction(Transaction, long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
    event_NodeReceivesPropagatedTransaction(Transaction, long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.DefaultNodeBehavior
    Invoked when the node receives a transaction propagated from another node.
    event_NodeReceivesPropagatedTransaction(Transaction, long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Handles transactions propagated from other nodes in the network.
    event_NodeReceivesPropagatedTransaction(Transaction, long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HonestNodeBehavior
    Handles transactions propagated from other nodes.
    event_NodeReceivesPropagatedTransaction(Transaction, long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.MaliciousNodeBehavior_Deprecated
     
    event_NodeReceivesPropagatedTransaction(Transaction, long) - Method in interface dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.NodeBehaviorStrategy
    Invoked when the node receives a transaction propagated from another node.
    exportToCSV(String) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector
    Exports detailed attack outcomes to a CSV file for further analysis.

    F

    flushAll() - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
     
    flushAttackReport() - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Save Attack report to file.
    flushBlockReport() - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Save Block report to file.
    flushCustomReports() - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Flushes all custom Bitcoin reports (block events, structure, and attack events) to files.
    flushStructReport() - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Save Blockchain report to file.

    G

    generateComparisonReport() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector
    Generates a comparison report with theoretical predictions.
    generateSummaryReport() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector
    Generates a summary report of all collected metrics.
    generateWhitepaperComparisonReport() - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackerSuccessProbabilityAnalyzer
    Generates a detailed report of attacker success probabilities for various hashpower ratios and confirmation counts, matching the tables from the whitepaper.
    getAttackPower() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Returns the attacker's mining power.
    getAttackState() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Returns the current operational state of the attack.
    getAttackTimeOut() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Returns the simulation time at which the current MONITORING or ATTACKING phase will be forcibly terminated.
    getBehaviorStrategy() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
    Returns the node's current NodeBehaviorStrategy.
    getBlockByID(int) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
    Finds a Block in the blockchain by its ID.
    getBlockchainHeight() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
    Returns the height of the blockchain, i.e., the height of the tallest block.
    getConfirmations(long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
     
    getConflictBlock(Block) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.DefaultNodeBehavior
    Builds a synthetic block containing the conflict-group counterparts of each transaction in b, based on the node's conflict registry.
    getCurrentAdvantage() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Returns the current advantage (hidden chain height minus public chain height).
    getCurrentConfirmations() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
     
    getCurrentNodeID() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
     
    getCurrID() - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
     
    getDuration() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector.AttackOutcome
     
    getFailedAttacks() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector
    Gets the number of failed attacks.
    getHeight() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
     
    getHonestBehavior() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Returns the wrapped honest behavior strategy.
    getInstance() - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector
    Gets the singleton instance of the metrics collector.
    getLastBlockEvent() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
     
    getLongestTip() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
    Returns the tip with the longest height.
    getMiningPool() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
     
    getMinSizeToMine() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
     
    getMinValueToMine() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
     
    getNetworkHonestPower() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
     
    getNextID() - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
    Retrieves the next unique ID for a new Block.
    getNonOverlappingTip(Block) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
    Given a Block b find the tallest tip whose chain to the genesis does not contain transactions whose ID matches one of the IDs in the transactions in b.
    getOperatingDifficulty() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
     
    getParent() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
     
    getProspectiveCycles() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
     
    getReleaseAdvantage() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Returns the release advantage threshold.
    getReleaseConfirmations() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
     
    getReleaseStrategy() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
     
    getRequiredConfirmationsBeforeAttack() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.MaliciousNodeBehavior_Deprecated
    Gets the number of block confirmations required before starting the attack.
    getSimTime_validation() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
     
    getStartAdvantage() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Returns the start advantage threshold.
    getStructure() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
     
    getSuccessfulAttacks() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector
    Gets the number of successful attacks.
    getSuccessRate() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector
    Gets the current success rate.
    getSysTime_validation() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
     
    getTargetTransaction() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Returns the target transaction ID.
    getTotalAttackAttempts() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector
    Gets the total number of attack attempts.
    getTransactionDepth(Block, long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
    Returns the depth under tip in which transaction exists, or null if the transaction does not exist.
    getTransactionGroup() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
     
    getValidationCycles() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
     
    getValidationDifficulty() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
     
    getValidationNodeID() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
     
    goToIdleState() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Transitions the attack state from MONITORING back to IDLE.
    goToMonitoringState() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Transitions the attack state from IDLE to MONITORING.

    H

    handleNewBlockReception(Block) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.DefaultNodeBehavior
    Integrates a newly received block into the node's blockchain and updates the transaction pool accordingly.
    handleNewBlockReception(Block) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HonestNodeBehaviorLimited
     
    hasChainOverlap(Block, Block) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
    Checks whether a block overlaps with the transactions in the chain from a given tip to genesis.
    hashCode() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
     
    hasParent() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
    Checks if the Block has a parent.
    hiddenBlocksMined - Variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector.AttackOutcome
     
    HiddenChainAttackBehavior - Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node
    Implements a hidden chain attack strategy for Bitcoin network simulation.
    HiddenChainAttackBehavior(BitcoinNode, HonestNodeBehavior, HonestNodeBehavior) - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Constructs a hidden chain attack behavior and binds it to a specific BitcoinNode instance.
    HiddenChainAttackBehavior.ReleaseStrategy - Enum Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node
    Enumeration of attack operational states.
    HiddenChainAttackBehavior.State - Enum Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node
    Enumeration of attack operational states.
    HonestNodeBehavior - Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node
    Implements the canonical ("honest") node behavior in the simulated Bitcoin network.
    HonestNodeBehavior(BitcoinNode) - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HonestNodeBehavior
    Constructs an honest node behavior strategy and binds it to a specific BitcoinNode instance.
    HonestNodeBehaviorLimited - Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node
     
    HonestNodeBehaviorLimited(BitcoinNode) - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HonestNodeBehaviorLimited
     

    I

    IDLE - Enum constant in enum class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior.State
    Normal honest operation; no attack in progress.
    inHiddenChain(Transaction) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Determines whether a given transaction is contained in any block of the hidden chain.
    INITIAL_TARGET - Static variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.BitcoinDifficultyUtility
     
    initialize() - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Initializes reporting settings from simulation configuration properties.
    isWorthMining() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.DefaultNodeBehavior
    Determines whether the current mining pool is sufficiently valuable to justify mining activity.
    isWorthMining() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
     

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.BitcoinMainDriver
     
    main(String[]) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackerSuccessProbabilityAnalyzer
    Main method for standalone testing and report generation.
    MaliciousNodeBehavior_Deprecated - Class in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node
     
    MaliciousNodeBehavior_Deprecated(BitcoinNode) - Constructor for class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.MaliciousNodeBehavior_Deprecated
    Constructor.
    MAX_HASH_VALUE - Static variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.BitcoinDifficultyUtility
     
    miningPool - Variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
     
    minSizeToMine - Variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
     
    minValueToMine - Variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
     
    MONITORING - Enum constant in enum class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior.State
    Monitoring the network for attack trigger; node operates honestly.

    N

    node - Variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.DefaultNodeBehavior
    The BitcoinNode to which this behavior strategy is attached.
    NodeBehaviorStrategy - Interface in dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node
    Defines the strategy interface for Bitcoin node behavior within the Simulation environment.
    nodeStatusReport() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode

    O

    operatingDifficulty - Variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
     

    P

    packedTargetToBTCDifficulty(String) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.BitcoinDifficultyUtility
    Converts current target to equivalent, implied difficulty rating.
    packedTargetToCNS(String) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.BitcoinDifficultyUtility
    Often, bitcoin difficulty is not given directly, but implicitly through a packed target value ("bits").
    periodicReport() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
    poolTargetToBTCDifficulty(String) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.BitcoinDifficultyUtility
    From the pool difficulty (i.e. full, untruncated target value), calculates and returns the implied difficulty level.
    poolTargetToCNS(String) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.BitcoinDifficultyUtility
    Often, bitcoin difficulty is not given directly, but implicitly through a target value (the pool target is the full, untruncated value of this target).
    printComparison() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector
    Prints the comparison with theoretical model to debug output.
    printComprehensiveAnalysis() - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackerSuccessProbabilityAnalyzer
    Prints a comprehensive analysis including both theoretical predictions and guidelines for simulation validation.
    printCurrentMetrics() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector
    Prints the current metrics to debug output.
    printHiddenChain(String) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Returns a comma-separated string of block IDs in the hidden chain, ordered from the chain root to the tip.
    printHiddenChainAndContent(String) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
     
    printLongestChain() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
    Prints the longest chain from the tip to genesis.
    printOrphans() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
    Prints the orphans list.
    printOrphansReport(int) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
    Like Blockchain.printOrphans() with additional information.
    printStructure() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
    Print structure for direct presentation.
    printStructureReport(int) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
    Like Blockchain.printStructure() but with additional information including the ID of the node it exists.
    printTips(String) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
    Prints the IDs of the Blocks currently in the list of tips
    printTipsHash(String) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
     
    processPostValidationActivities(long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.DefaultNodeBehavior
    Performs cleanup and re-initialization steps following successful block validation.
    processPostValidationActivities(long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Performs cleanup and re-initialization steps following hidden block validation.
    publicBlocksMined - Variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector.AttackOutcome
     

    R

    reconstructMiningPool() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.DefaultNodeBehavior
    Reconstructs the node’s mining pool by selecting the top transactions according to value-per-size ratio.
    recordAttackFailure(int) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector
    Records a failed attack (honest chain remained longest).
    recordAttackStart(int) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector
    Records the start of a new attack attempt.
    recordAttackSuccess(int) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector
    Records a successful attack (attacker's chain became longest).
    recordHiddenBlockMined(int) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector
    Records that the attacker mined a hidden block.
    recordPublicBlockMined(int) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector
    Records that the public (honest) chain grew.
    reportAttackDetails - Static variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Flag indicating whether attack events should be reported in detail
    reportAttackDetails(boolean) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
     
    reportAttackEvent(int, long, long, int, String, int, int, int, int, int, String) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Reports an attack-related event to the attack log.
    reportAttackEvents - Static variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Flag indicating whether attack events should be reported
    reportAttackEvents(boolean) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Sets whether attack events should be logged.
    reportBlockChainState(String[], String[]) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Adds blockchain and orphan block state to the structure log.
    reportBlockEvent(int, long, long, int, int, int, int, String, String, double, double) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Adds a detailed event line for a single block to the block log.
    reportBlockEvents - Static variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Flag indicating whether block events should be reported
    reportBlockEvents(boolean) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Sets whether block-level events should be logged.
    reportsAttackDetails() - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
     
    reportsAttackEvents() - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Returns whether attack events are being logged.
    reportsBlockEvents() - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Returns whether block-level events are being logged.
    reportsStructureEvents() - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Returns whether blockchain structure events are being logged.
    reportStructureEvents - Static variable in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Flag indicating whether blockchain structure events should be reported
    reportStructureEvents(boolean) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.reporter.BitcoinReporter
    Sets whether blockchain structure events should be logged.
    reset() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector
    Resets all collected metrics.
    resetCurrID() - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
    Resets the next available block ID to 1.

    S

    satisfiesDependencies(TransactionGroup, TxDependencyRegistry) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
     
    satisfiesDependencies(Transaction, TxDependencyRegistry) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
     
    setAttackPower(float) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Sets the attacker's mining power, i.e. the power that the attacker will assume once the attack starts.
    setAttackTimeOut(long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Sets the simulation time at which an ongoing MONITORING or ATTACKING phase must be forcibly terminated.
    setBehaviorStrategy(NodeBehaviorStrategy) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
    Sets the node's NodeBehaviorStrategy, e.g., Honest or Malicious.
    setConfiguration(double, int) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.AttackMetricsCollector
    Sets the attack configuration parameters.
    setCurrentNodeID(int) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
     
    setCurrID(int) - Static method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
     
    setHeight(int) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
     
    setHonestBehavior(HonestNodeBehavior) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Sets the wrapped honest behavior strategy.
    setLastBlockEvent(String) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
     
    setMiningPool(TransactionGroup) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
     
    setMinSizeToMine(long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
    Sets the minimum total transaction size (in TODO units) required for this node to consider mining a new block.
    setMinValueToMine(long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
    Sets the minimum total transaction value required to start mining.
    setNetworkHonestPower(float) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
     
    setParent(TransactionGroup) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
     
    setReleaseAdvantage(Integer) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Sets the advantage threshold that triggers hidden chain release.
    setReleaseConfirmations(Integer) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
     
    setRequiredConfirmationsBeforeAttack(int) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.MaliciousNodeBehavior_Deprecated
    Sets the number of block confirmations required before starting the attack.
    setSimTime_validation(long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
     
    setStartAdvantage(Integer) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Sets the advantage threshold that triggers attack start.
    setStructure(Blockchain) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
     
    setSysTime_validation(long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block

    Sets the target transaction for the attack.
    setTargetTransaction(Transaction) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.MaliciousNodeBehavior_Deprecated

    timeAdvancementReport() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
    toString() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Returns a string representation of the attack behavior state.
    transactionBelief(long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
    Checks if a transaction is believed by the node, i.e., if it exists in the longest chain.
    transactionBelieved(long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Blockchain
    Checks if a transaction is fully believed by the node, i.e., if it exists in the longest chain.
    transactionContainedInPool(Transaction) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.DefaultNodeBehavior
     
    transactionContainedInStructure(Transaction) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.DefaultNodeBehavior

    transactionReceipt(Transaction, long) - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.DefaultNodeBehavior
    Handles the receipt of a transaction and updates the mining pool accordingly.
